Whenever that's the case you can pass your own URL or a Base64 data URI.</p></div><h3 id="files-data-uri" class="flex flex-row space-x-2 pt-2 font-heading font-medium text-content-strong text-lg"><span>Data URI (base64)</span><a href="#files-data-uri" class="font-mono font-extralight text-content-muted transition-colors hover:text-content-lighter">#</a></h3><div class="prose max-w-full dark:prose-invert"><p>You can pass a Base64 data URI as a file input. The API will handle the file decoding for you. Keep in mind that for large files, this alternative although convenient can impact the request performance.</p></div><h3 id="files-from-url" class="flex flex-row space-x-2 pt-2 font-heading font-medium text-content-strong text-lg"><span>Hosted files (URL)</span><a href="#files-from-url" class="font-mono font-extralight text-content-muted transition-colors hover:text-content-lighter">#</a></h3><div class="prose max-w-full dark:prose-invert"><p>You can also pass your own URLs as long as they are publicly accessible. Be aware that some hosts might block cross-site requests, rate-limit, or consider the request as a bot.</p></div><h3 id="files-upload" class="flex flex-row space-x-2 pt-2 font-heading font-medium text-content-strong text-lg"><span>Uploading files</span><a href="#files-upload" class="font-mono font-extralight text-content-muted transition-colors hover:text-content-lighter">#</a></h3><div class="prose max-w-full dark:prose-invert"><p>We provide a convenient file storage that allows you to upload files and use them in your requests. Supports Chinese and English, max 800 characters.</p></div></div></div><div class="flex flex-col items-start justify-start space-y-2"><div class="select-none space-x-2"><code class="leading-2 select-text rounded bg-black/[2%] px-2 py-1 align-middle text-sm font-semibold text-content-base dark:bg-white/5">audio_url</code><span class="select-auto"> </span><code class="select-text text-sm text-content-light">string</code></div><div class="prose max-w-full ps-2 dark:prose-invert md:ps-3 lg:ps-4"><div><p>URL of the audio to use as the background music. Must be publicly accessible.
Limit handling: If the audio duration exceeds the duration value (5 or 10 seconds),
the audio is truncated to the first 5 or 10 seconds, and the rest is discarded. If
the audio is shorter than the video, the remaining part of the video will be silent.
For example, if the audio is 3 seconds long and the video duration is 5 seconds, the
first 3 seconds of the output video will have sound, and the last 2 seconds will be silent.</p>
<ul>
<li>Format: WAV, MP3.</li>
<li>Duration: 3 to 30 s.</li>
<li>File size: Up to 15 MB.</li>
</ul></div></div></div><div class="flex flex-col items-start justify-start space-y-2"><div class="select-none space-x-2"><code class="leading-2 select-text rounded bg-black/[2%] px-2 py-1 align-middle text-sm font-semibold text-content-base dark:bg-white/5">aspect_ratio</code><span class="select-auto"> </span><code class="select-text text-sm text-content-light">AspectRatioEnum</code></div><div class="prose max-w-full ps-2 dark:prose-invert md:ps-3 lg:ps-4"><div><p>The aspect ratio of the generated video Default value: <code>"16:9"</code></p></div><p>Possible enum values:<!-- --> <code>16:9, 9:16, 1:1</code></p></div></div><div class="flex flex-col items-start justify-start space-y-2"><div class="select-none space-x-2"><code class="leading-2 select-text rounded bg-black/[2%] px-2 py-1 align-middle text-sm font-semibold text-content-base dark:bg-white/5">resolution</code><span class="select-auto"> </span><code class="select-text text-sm text-content-light">ResolutionEnum</code></div><div class="prose max-w-full ps-2 dark:prose-invert md:ps-3 lg:ps-4"><div><p>Video resolution tier Default value: <code>"1080p"</code></p></div><p>Possible enum values:<!-- --> <code>480p, 720p, 1080p</code></p></div></div><div class="flex flex-col items-start justify-start space-y-2"><div class="select-none space-x-2"><code class="leading-2 select-text rounded bg-black/[2%] px-2 py-1 align-middle text-sm font-semibold text-content-base dark:bg-white/5">duration</code><span class="select-auto"> </span><code class="select-text text-sm text-content-light">DurationEnum</code></div><div class="prose max-w-full ps-2 dark:prose-invert md:ps-3 lg:ps-4"><div><p>Duration of the generated video in seconds. Choose between 5 or 10 seconds. Default value: <code>"5"</code></p></div><p>Possible enum values:<!-- --> <code>5, 10</code></p></div></div><div class="flex flex-col items-start justify-start space-y-2"><div class="select-none space-x-2"><code class="leading-2 select-text rounded bg-black/[2%] px-2 py-1 align-middle text-sm font-semibold text-content-base dark:bg-white/5">negative_prompt</code><span class="select-auto"> </span><code class="select-text text-sm text-content-light">string</code></div><div class="prose max-w-full ps-2 dark:prose-invert md:ps-3 lg:ps-4"><div><p>Negative prompt to describe content to avoid.
